goal: Add a side-effect-free readiness assessor for mounting the BPK-043 cockpit route source handler behind the existing cockpit read-only boundary, requiring ready handler output, default-off env gate, route module reference, and disabled actions without changing server, route, renderer, runtime, or package files.
scope_out: Do not mount routes, mutate server files, change renderer files, enable cockpit actions, call AICOS, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, or deployment files.
claims: Cockpit handler mount readiness can be assessed without mounting.
Ready handler output and env gate are required.
assumptions: A later server mount block may use this readiness result.
dod: Ready, missing module ref, and executable-action blocker cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Route mounting, renderer mutation, executable actions, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, or deployment changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-043 prepared the cockpit source handler skeleton without route mutation.
